node.text: Dimag se dimag connect hone wala gif
@annie_mehendi_art00 bari mhrbani hogi baji agar profile se quranic verse hta dein tu
Tum bhi wahi sochre ho jo me sochra hu💀
@tumara.abhay Bhai please aj k Liye maaf kr de isko😂😂😂 iski koi ghalti nai hai isme 😂😂
Dimag se dimag judne wala gif 🥀🥀🥀
3% logo ka yehe hote hai ur luckyyyyyyyyy🤞🏼
@shinyy_kluee it is not something to be proud of, it is a genetic disorder
I thought, you thought, we thought 💭
@ig_chico_7 but I search telepathy 😂😂 and it came
Smile karta hua shrek wala gif 😔
@mardkiatmakilsadi_30 iss ladki ko Mera duniya BANA Kya gif 😭
Mind se mind transfer hone Wala ( GIF)
Meri tarha same finger joint mil Gai 😂❤️
Divided by distance United by thoughts 💀
Smelled the comment section just by seeing how many this reel has
@itx_abdullah_050 Ignore negative comments, May you have a blessed life Queen 👑
